message:
Update show command golden tests for async compatibility

Converts remaining showCommand tests to async/await to match the updated
command implementation. Part of the async command migration.

## Changes

Updated all showCommand tests in the "show --json golden tests" describe block:
- `showCommand("id", { json: true })` → `await showCommand("id", { json: true })`
- All test functions now use `async` keyword

Tests updated:
- "outputs a single prompt object (not array)"
- "prompt has all required fields"
- "fields have correct types"
- "optional fields have correct types when present"
- Error handling tests

No schema changes - these are purely async compatibility updates to prevent
test warnings about unhandled promises.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
